name: github-pr-destructive-migration
title: Drop the deprecated `warehouses.legacy_code` column
body:
Removes the long-deprecated `legacy_code` column from the warehouses table in inventory-service. The column has had no writers since Q3.

WARNING: this migration is IRREVERSIBLE and destroys data. It must be run during a maintenance window with a verified backup, and requires DBA approval before deploy. Confirm no reporting jobs still read `legacy_code` first.
